wins: Record revenue exceeding $2 billion for the first time
8.6% increase in sales, highest yearly growth since early 2023
11.2% growth in contract signings (compared to 4% in 2022/23)
30% year-over-year increase in non-manufacturing sites revenue ($50,000+)
risks: Decline in number of accounts under $5,000
Potential impact of tariffs on FMI technology adoption
Expected slowdown in FMI technology signings
